name: article_id
description: ESPN numeric article ID — primary deduplication key

name: game_date
description: Date the scraper ran (partition key); articles published on this date

name: description
description: Lede / blurb — 1-2 sentence article summary from ESPN

name: published_at
description: UTC timestamp when the article was first published on ESPN

name: last_modified
description: UTC timestamp of the most recent article update on ESPN

name: web_url
description: Full espn.com URL to the article

name: is_premium
description: True if the article is behind the ESPN+ paywall

name: athlete_ids
description: ESPN athlete IDs tagged in this article's categories

name: athlete_names
description: Display names of athletes tagged in this article

name: topic_tags
description: ESPN topic/category labels (e.g. news, injury, trade)

name: scraped_at
description: UTC timestamp when this article was collected by the scraper

name: source_file_path
description: GCS path of the source JSON file written by the scraper
